goal: forall(x0: Set[Sum[X, Y]] -> Bool) { forall(x1: Set[Sum[X, Y]]) { x0(x1) implies is_open_in_sum[X, Y](x1) } implies is_open_in_sum[X, Y](lib(topological_space).big_union[Sum[X, Y]](x0)) }
proof: let w0: Set[Sum[X, Y]] -> Bool satisfy { forall(x0: Set[Sum[X, Y]]) { not w0(x0) or is_open_in_sum[X, Y](x0) } and not is_open_in_sum[X, Y](lib(topological_space).big_union[Sum[X, Y]](w0)) }

function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[Sum[T0, T1]] -> Bool) { not forall(x1: Set[Sum[T0, T1]]) { not x0(x1) or is_open_in_sum[T0, T1](x1) } or is_open_in_sum[T0, T1](lib(topological_space).big_union[Sum[T0, T1]](x0)) }[X, Y](w0)
function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace] { is_open_in_sum[T0, T1](Set.empty_set[Sum[T0, T1]]) }[X, Y]

goal: forall(x0: Set[Sum[X, Y]], x1: Set[Sum[X, Y]]) { is_open_in_sum[X, Y](x0) and is_open_in_sum[X, Y](x1) implies is_open_in_sum[X, Y](x0.intersection(x1)) }
proof: let w0: Set[Sum[X, Y]] satisfy { exists(k0: Set[Sum[X, Y]]) { is_open_in_sum[X, Y](w0) and is_open_in_sum[X, Y](k0) and not is_open_in_sum[X, Y](w0 ∩ k0) } }
let w1: Set[Sum[X, Y]] satisfy { is_open_in_sum[X, Y](w0) and is_open_in_sum[X, Y](w1) and not is_open_in_sum[X, Y](w0 ∩ w1) }
let w2: Set[Sum[X, Y]] satisfy { is_open_in_sum[X, Y](w0) and is_open_in_sum[X, Y](w2) and not is_open_in_sum[X, Y](w0 ∩ w2) }

function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[Sum[T0, T1]], x1: Set[Sum[T0, T1]]) { not is_open_in_sum[T0, T1](x0) or not is_open_in_sum[T0, T1](x1) or is_open_in_sum[T0, T1](x0 ∩ x1) }[X, Y](w0, w2)
function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace] { is_open_in_sum[T0, T1](Set.universal_set[Sum[T0, T1]]) }[X, Y]
function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[Sum[T0, T1]]) { TopologicalSpace.is_open[Sum[T0, T1]](x0) = is_open_in_sum[T0, T1](x0) }[X, Y](w)

goal: preimage_contains[X, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inl[X, Y], w, x) = w.contains(Sum.inl[X, Y](x))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[X, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inl[X, Y], w, x)

goal: set_preimage[X, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inl[X, Y], w).contains(x) = sum_left_preimage[X, Y](w).contains(x)

proof: let w0: X satisfy { w0 ∈ set_preimage[X, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inl[X, Y], w) != w0 ∈ sum_left_preimage[X, Y](w) }

goal: preimage_contains[Y, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inr[X, Y], w, y) = w.contains(Sum.inr[X, Y](y))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[Y, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inr[X, Y], w, y)

goal: set_preimage[Y, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inr[X, Y], w).contains(y) = sum_right_preimage[X, Y](w).contains(y)

proof: let w0: Y satisfy { w0 ∈ set_preimage[Y, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inr[X, Y], w) != w0 ∈ sum_right_preimage[X, Y](w) }

goal: is_continuous[X, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inl[X, Y]) = forall(x0: Set[Sum[X, Y]]) { TopologicalSpace.is_open(x0) implies X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inl[X, Y], x0)) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not T0.is_open(x1) or T1.is_open(set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x1)) } = is_continuous[T1, T0](x0) }[Sum[X, Y], X](sum_inl[X, Y])
let w0: Set[Sum[X, Y]] satisfy { TopologicalSpace.is_open[Sum[X, Y]](w0) and not X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inl[X, Y], w0)) }
function(x0: Set[Sum[X, Y]]) { not TopologicalSpace.is_open[Sum[X, Y]](x0) or X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inl[X, Y], x0)) }(w0)

goal: is_continuous[Y, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inr[X, Y]) = forall(x0: Set[Sum[X, Y]]) { TopologicalSpace.is_open(x0) implies Y.is_open(set_preimage[Y, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inr[X, Y], x0)) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not T0.is_open(x1) or T1.is_open(set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x1)) } = is_continuous[T1, T0](x0) }[Sum[X, Y], Y](sum_inr[X, Y])
let w0: Set[Sum[X, Y]] satisfy { TopologicalSpace.is_open[Sum[X, Y]](w0) and not Y.is_open(set_preimage[Y, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inr[X, Y], w0)) }
function(x0: Set[Sum[X, Y]]) { not TopologicalSpace.is_open[Sum[X, Y]](x0) or Y.is_open(set_preimage[Y, Sum[X, Y]](sum_inr[X, Y], x0)) }(w0)
